fallback.name: FutureAGI EvalOps MCP
fallback.tagline: Hosted MCP for AI SDK eval dashboard.
fallback.description: FutureAGI EvalOps MCP is a paid remote MCP endpoint for AI SDK eval dashboard. It exposes structured JSON tools, a public server card, token-based access, usage receipts, and audit-ready workflow evidence for AI agents and coding teams.
